items.title: Shopping Discovery discovery
items.name: Shopping Discovery discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether better broad-intent search refinement and grounded AI guidance improve confident order starts without increasing regret.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether order-frequency drag comes more from ranking noise, weak comparison support, or insufficient trust cues on early product exploration.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve broad-intent shopping conversion through search refinement, grounded product comparison, and higher-confidence discovery.

riskFocus.question: Will shoppers buy more often if Amazon reduces decision effort for broad-intent shopping missions?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Household shoppers convert more often when search and AI guidance reduce shortlist complexity before they reach product detail pages.

plannedActivities: Compare broad-intent and explicit-intent conversion cohorts.
Test guided comparison patterns in Rufus-assisted sessions.
Review top abandonment reasons before product detail engagement.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which shopping-assistant and search-refinement patterns become default in Q2.

items.title: Prime Promise Reliability discovery
items.name: Prime Promise Reliability discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing where Prime trust erodes most between checkout promise, order tracking, and returns or refund handling.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether avoidable Prime dissatisfaction comes more from promise precision, order-state ambiguity, or slow issue recovery.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve delivery promise precision, order-state clarity, and low-cost issue resolution.

riskFocus.question: Will Prime households renew more reliably if promise visibility and issue recovery become clearer?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Retention improves when shoppers understand delivery status earlier and can solve common problems without escalation.

plannedActivities: Map order-issue escalation points after missed or delayed promises.
Review resolution time and self-service completion by issue type.
Test revised order-state and refund explanations.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which promise and issue-resolution treatments become the standard Prime recovery pattern in Q2.

items.title: Seller Buyability discovery
items.name: Seller Buyability discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether sellers lose more growth from listing-readiness friction, inventory blind spots, or weak FBA planning visibility.
items.opportunity: Clarify which operational problems most consistently suppress shipped-sales growth on strategic assortments.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve seller launch readiness, stock predictability, and fulfillment attach on strategic assortments.

riskFocus.question: Do sellers grow more profitably when buyability and replenishment risks are made explicit earlier?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Sellers convert more catalog effort into growth when launch blockers and stock risks are surfaced before revenue is lost.

plannedActivities: Compare shipped-sales drag across launch and stockout failure modes.
Review FBA decision friction on strategic ASIN cohorts.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which seller health signals become mandatory in launch and FBA workflows this quarter.

items.title: Retail Media discovery
items.name: Retail Media discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing which product changes most improve advertiser confidence in measured retail outcomes.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether advertiser confidence is constrained more by retail mismatches, weak reporting legibility, or insufficient incrementality support.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve advertiser outcome confidence through retail-aware campaign controls and clearer measurement workflows.

riskFocus.question: Can advertisers make better budget decisions when retail and media outcomes are shown in one causal story?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Budget confidence rises when marketers can see how availability, conversion, and spend interact without stitching together multiple tools.

plannedActivities: Review top reporting and reconciliation pain points on strategic accounts.
Map wasted spend tied to out-of-stock or suppressed products.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which measurement and retail-readiness controls become default for strategic advertiser workflows in Q2.
